div.head: 124. Editorial Note
div.p: On March 22, 1962, Secretary of Defense McNamara, Admiral Felt, Ambassador Nolting, General Harkins, and numerous other officials met at CINCPAC Headquarters in Honolulu for the fourth Secretary of Defenseʼs Conference. A full record of the meeting is in Washington National Records Center, RG 84, Saigon Embassy Files: FRC 68 A 5159, SecDef Conf., Mar. 1962. For a summary record, see Document 125. Regarding the third Honolulu Conference, February 19, see Document 71.
